title: Inventory Flat Pack [Addon]
description: Flat block icons for those that want a simpler inventory
body:
![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/Aq7MLVGe/images/61a0b2c52291afa0ed9e2badd3b26986029fab16.png)
## Inventory Flat Pack!

This pack should be compatible with most existing resource packs:

1. Download this pack
2. Put it in your resourcepacks folder
3. Enable it, leaving it above your other packs
4. Enjoy!
